creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
I am encountering a run depends error while building textproc/py-sphinx-tabs using poudriere on my 13.1 stable system. 

The error is below:

[13amd64-Default-job-01] `-- Installing py39-Babel-2.10.3...
[13amd64-Default-job-01] |   `-- Installing py39-pytz-2022.5,1...
[13amd64-Default-job-01] |   `-- Extracting py39-pytz-2022.5,1: .......... done
[13amd64-Default-job-01] `-- Extracting py39-Babel-2.10.3: .......... done
[13amd64-Default-job-01] `-- Installing py39-markupsafe-2.1.1...
[13amd64-Default-job-01] `-- Extracting py39-markupsafe-2.1.1: .......... done
[13amd64-Default-job-01] Extracting py39-Jinja2-3.1.2: .......... done
===>   py39-sphinx-tabs-3.4.0 depends on package: py39-Jinja2>=0<3.1.0 - not found
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/textproc/py-sphinx-tabs
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for py39-sphinx-tabs-3.4.0
build of textproc/py-sphinx-tabs | py39-sphinx-tabs-3.4.0 ended at Fri Nov 11 20:17:18 EST 2022
build time: 00:00:13
!!! build failure encountered !!!
